name: Manga & Anime
description: Japanese manga and anime — iconic characters, creators, and series

questions.q: Who is the straw-hat-wearing pirate captain at the center of the long-running 'One Piece' series?

source.notes: Captain of the Straw Hat Pirates.

questions.q: Goku is the protagonist of which long-running anime and manga franchise?

source.notes: First appeared in Dragon Ball (1984).

questions.q: What is the real name of the high-schooler who transforms into Sailor Moon?

source.notes: Known as Serena in the English dub.

questions.q: What is the name of the bald, unbeatable superhero in 'One Punch Man'?

source.notes: Created by ONE; manga by Yusuke Murata.

questions.q: Which Japanese artist created the original 'Dragon Ball' manga?

source.notes: Serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump 1984–1995.

questions.q: What is Goku's famous, two-handed, blue energy-beam attack called?

source.notes: Taught to Goku by Master Roshi.

questions.q: Which young alchemist is the protagonist of 'Fullmetal Alchemist'?

source.notes: Nicknamed 'The Fullmetal Alchemist' by the military.

questions.q: Who is the Titan-fighting protagonist of 'Attack on Titan'?

source.notes: Created by Hajime Isayama; manga ran 2009–2021.

questions.q: In 'Death Note', what is the name of the mysterious, sweets-loving detective who pursues Kira?

source.notes: His full name 'L Lawliet' is revealed in the supplementary material.

questions.q: Which Studio Ghibli co-founder directed 'Kiki's Delivery Service', 'Spirited Away', and 'My Neighbor Totoro'?

source.notes: Co-founded Studio Ghibli in 1985 with Takahata and Toshio Suzuki.

questions.q: Which orange-haired substitute Soul Reaper is the protagonist of 'Bleach'?

source.notes: Manga by Tite Kubo; serialized 2001–2016.

questions.q: In 'My Hero Academia', what is the real name of the protagonist nicknamed 'Deku'?

source.notes: Inherits the quirk 'One For All' from All Might.

questions.q: Which three-sword-wielding swordsman is a member of the Straw Hat Pirates in 'One Piece'?

source.notes: Uses a three-sword style called Santoryu.

questions.q: Goku and Vegeta are both members of which warrior race?

source.notes: Native to Planet Vegeta, destroyed by Frieza.

questions.q: Who created the 'Naruto' manga?

source.notes: Serialized in Weekly Shonen Jump 1999–2014.

questions.q: Which director behind 'Your Name.' (Kimi no Na wa) and 'Weathering with You' is one of anime's biggest modern filmmakers?

source.notes: 'Your Name.' (2016) became one of the highest-grossing anime films ever.

questions.q: In the 'Naruto' series, who is sealed inside the protagonist as the Nine-Tailed Fox?

source.notes: Kurama (Nine-Tails) was sealed inside Naruto at birth.

questions.q: What type of pet is the titular 'Doraemon'?

source.notes: A blue robot cat from the 22nd century.

questions.q: Who is the creator of the long-running, style-heavy manga 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure'?

source.notes: Began serialization in 1987.

questions.q: What is the real name of the teenage detective shrunk into a child's body in 'Detective Conan / Case Closed'?

source.notes: Goes by the alias Conan Edogawa after being poisoned by the Black Organization.

questions.q: At the end of 'Naruto Shippuden', Naruto marries which classmate?

source.notes: They have two children, Boruto and Himawari.

questions.q: In 'Hunter x Hunter', what is the name of the life-energy-manipulation system central to the series?

source.notes: Divided into six categories: Enhancement, Emission, Manipulation, Transmutation, Conjuration, Specialization.
